name: clinical-skills
description: Clinical skills for evidence synthesis and protocol review. UK NHS context. ISO 42001 compliant.

plugins.name: clinical-evidence
plugins.description: Systematic literature search and clinical protocol review against current guidelines. Bundles two skills that share a verified reference ledger: literature-search (PubMed + Scholar Gateway + guidelines) and protocol-reviewer (cross-references an uploaded protocol against the evidence base). AI-assisted draft; clinician approval required.
